scope: AgenC model-facing Task* tool family: durable project task-board tools plus background lifecycle output and stop tools.

requiredBehaviors: TaskCreate creates pending unowned tasks with subject, description, activeForm, and metadata fields
TaskGet returns full task details and reports missing tasks as tool errors
TaskUpdate handles status, owner, field, metadata, deletion, addBlocks, and addBlockedBy updates
TaskList returns durable tasks with unresolved blocker filtering
edgeCases: metadata null values delete existing keys
dependency edges auto-mirror under the list lock
tasks with truthy metadata._internal are omitted from TaskList output
TaskCreate expands the task panel when the app-state bridge exists and is a no-op otherwise
invalid task references return a tool error with missing ids

requiredBehaviors: TaskOutput reads output from running and completed background lifecycle tasks
block=false performs a non-blocking read and returns not_ready for running tasks
blocking reads wait until completion or return timeout when the task is still active
the task_name returned by spawn_agent resolves as a TaskOutput handle for the lifecycle task
TaskOutput reads canonical lifecycle output when called through an agent-path alias
TaskOutput owns its blocking deadline so the generic executor does not cap long timeout arguments
terminal tasks return retrieval_status success and include task status, type, description, and output
model-visible TaskOutput content includes retrieval_status, task id/type, status, and nested output blocks
edgeCases: missing task ids return a tool error
invalid block inputs and timeout values outside 0..600000 return validation errors
empty output reports the task status rather than returning an empty string

requiredBehaviors: TaskStop accepts task_id and shell_id aliases
the task_name returned by spawn_agent resolves as a TaskStop handle for the lifecycle task
TaskStop calls the lifecycle stop path so AbortController and onStop hooks fire
successful stops return the stopped task id, type, and command/description
non-running or missing tasks return tool errors
edgeCases: omitting both task_id and shell_id returns a validation error
stopping a terminal task preserves terminal state and reports not_running
onStop failures surface as tool errors

requiredBehaviors: createModelFacingTools registers TaskCreate, TaskGet, TaskUpdate, TaskList, TaskOutput, and TaskStop
Task tools remain deferred from the default visible provider tool list
existing registry schemas for the Task* tools remain stable
edgeCases: the extraction does not change spawn_agent background lifecycle registration
strict validation continues to allow execution-injected call/session ids
